MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Wells Fargo Bank is present. Represented by Derrick Reams.
Attorney Daniel Bornstein appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendants Jeffrey Dembicer, Sarah Peak and Rose Dembicer are present.
Attorney Blain Bookey representing the defendants through limited scope.

Judge Ksenin, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 504, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
The trial date of SEP-17-2012 is vacated.
